title: Boston Dynamics’ New Upgraded ATLAS Just Went BEAST MODE
summary: Boston Dynamics has upgraded its Atlas humanoid robot with improved physical capabilities including lifting loaded objects, handling shifting weight, and performing movements beyond human capability. The robot is transitioning from demonstrations to practical deployment, with Hyundai planning to deploy 25,000 units across factories. Concurrent developments include Unitree's voice-controlled G1 robot and Gatsby's on-demand home cleaning service using humanoid robots.
